query:
SELECT id, 
  CAST(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_in_time) AS CHAR) as cin_unix,
  CAST(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_out_time) AS CHAR) as cout_unix,
  CAST(worked_minutes AS CHAR) as wm,
  CAST((UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_out_time) - UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_in_time))/60 AS CHAR) as calc_diff_min,
  CAST(check_in_time AS CHAR) as cin_str,
  CAST(check_out_time AS CHAR) as cout_str
FROM worker_daily_finance WHERE id = 210068;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT id, 
  CAST(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_in_time) AS CHAR) as cin_unix,
  CAST(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_out_time) AS CHAR) as cout_unix,
  CAST(worked_minutes AS CHAR) as wm,
  CAST((UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_out_time) - UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_in_time))/60 AS CHAR) as calc_diff_min,
  CAST(check_in_time AS CHAR) as cin_str,
  CAST(check_out_time AS CHAR) as cout_str
FROM worker_daily_finance WHERE id = 210068;
